ops.text: FOLLOW-UP SHIPPED (task 789ac8d9, Lane D, $0 LLM): the data-hygiene note is now enforced in the export. cc_steer/export.py dpo view drops degenerate pairs via dpo_degenerate: chosen == rejected or normalized word-level Levenshtein (this probe's d_word sensitivity metric — WORD_RE r"\w+|[^\w\s]", rapidfuzz Levenshtein.distance / max(len), empty-vs-empty = 0.0) < DPO_DEGENERACY_FLOOR = 0.005, mid-gap between the degenerate cluster (d_word == 0.0) and the next-nearest pair (d_word 0.0079). Recount over cp -c clones of the snapshot dpo view (_base-20260719/dataset/dpo) via the shipped predicate: train 7/470 dropped — exactly this probe's degenerate set (5 exact-identical + whitespace-only 09264870964c, c972d424d449) — and test 1/48 (3723c61f6343, same whitespace-only shape outside the probe's train-focused enumeration); 463+47 = 510 pairs kept. sft/kto views unchanged (KTO consumes unpaired signal). Gates: pytest 971 green, Linux ty clean. Report attached.
